title: Avoid Mistakingly Sending Empty Emails
excerpt: Within the Emails & Activities view, it is very easy to accidentally press Send when choosing a saved template, which results in sending an email with no subject and no body. I do not believe that you should be able to p…

posts.author: Chance (Chance Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: Within the Emails & Activities view, it is very easy to accidentally press Send when choosing a saved template, which results in sending an email with no subject and no body. I do not believe that you should be able to press Send unless there is something typed in the email subject line. (or typed in the body too, as long as the default signature doesn’t count as a text in the body)

posts.author: mkeffeler (Miclain Keffeler)
posts.cookedHtml: same here, would be nice to find a way to enforce.
